text:
Once upon a time in a quiet forest lived a wise old owl. Everyone loved animals at her home.

One day her greatest friend, a little bat named Flutter, flew too close to a lamp-post. A spark caught him.

The owl carried him back to her cozy nest. Days passed.

One morning the owl couldn't hear Flutter fluttering.

Concerned, she flew out.

On ice.

The owl couldn't save him.

So she buried him at dawn.

Each year on bat day...

She sang ballads.

Their songs became famous. Lots of bats made her home.

That's why she was known as the most beautiful owl alive.

She had butterflies.

Maybe they thought...

They liked her songs?

Maybe their wings were like hers. Golden.

That's why she sang.

Oh, old owl.

Now you have lots of friends.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
